LAW AND MOTION 301, JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL.
